extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter won bunch sprint after BISSEGGER Stefan's 35km solo break neutralized, INEOS attacked intermediate sprint to gain time bonuses.
tactical_patterns: INEOS deployed ROWE Luke intermediate sprint leadout for THOMAS Geraint time bonuses, moving him top five despite sprint stage.
BISSEGGER Stefan attacked breakaway companions 35km out, extended solo gap to 59 seconds before BikeExchange-led peloton chase.
SCHACHMANN Maximilian countered THOMAS Geraint intermediate sprint attack, taking 2-second bonus, showing GC awareness on sprint stage.

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: first WorldTour win in nine months demonstrates recovered sprint power sustainability, team committed full leadout resources
rider_signals.BISSEGGER Stefan: positive: launched 35km solo attack from breakaway, held minute gap showing aggressive racing despite eventual capture
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: INEOS orchestrated intermediate sprint ambush for time bonuses, moving him into top five GC position
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: negative: caught in late crash outside 3km safety zone, dropped from second overall to outside top ten
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: crashed agonizingly just outside 3km safety zone, lost significant time on GC contenders
rider_signals.WILLIAMS Stephen: neutral: retained yellow jersey third consecutive day without notable action, benefited from others' misfortune
rider_signals.KRON Andreas: positive: moved to second overall GC through consistent positioning while favorites crashed or lost time
